title: `Context has expired`: While executing URL
poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = Memory();
key_bug_features: Executing URL with expired context in query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'Alice', now()), (2, 'Bob', now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
CREATE TABLE t2 (value Float64, description Nullable(String)) ENGINE = Memory();
SELECT (SELECT t2.value FROM url('http://localhost:8123/?query=SELECT+COUNT(*)', 'CSV') tx) FROM t1 WHERE id = 1;
